headline: Zscaler sees downbeat quarterly revenue as competition heats up in cybersecurity market
summary: Zscaler forecast fourth-quarter revenue below estimates on Tuesday, signaling intensifying competition in ‌the cybersecurity market as enterprises scrutinize spending ‌on cloud security products, sending shares down 15% in extended ​trading. Despite the push to secure modern IT environments, Zscaler faces competition from larger rivals such as Palo Alto Networks, which are vying for more ‌market share with ⁠their own platform offerings. Zscaler primarily competes in the Secure Access Service Edge (SASE) ⁠market, which combines networking and security into a single platform to connect users, devices and applications from ​anywhere.
